info.title: NonKYC REST API
info.description:
### Base API url ``` https://api.nonkyc.io/api/v2/ ``` ### Ready to use API libraries: GitHub: [https://github.com/NonKYC](https://github.com/NonKYC) ### Datetime Formatting Timestamps returned as String are in ISO8601 format in UTC. Example: "2021-12-01T00:00:00Z" or "2021-12-01T00:00:00.000Z". If a timestamp is returned as a Number, then that is a Unix timestamp in milliseconds. ### Precision Formatting All finance data such as price, quantity, and fee should be string representation of arbitrary precision numbers to prevent floating point issues. Example: "9823.23932892". Integers should be represented in integer format and not a string. ### Authentication There are two authentication methods available for you to choose from. Basic Auth & HmacSha256 Signed Requests. Signed requests are more secure as it prevents replay attacks and accidental duplicate calls. to make authenticated requests you must include the apiKey (public api key), nonce(Current timestamp in unix milliseconds) and signature in your request headers (X-API-KEY, X-API-NONCE and X-API-SIGN). The signature is created by hashing the following string using the HMAC-SHA256 algorithm. The API secret (apiSecret) is used as the key for the HMAC calculation - For Get requests : Concatenate the API Key, Request URL and Nonce into a single string. - For Post requests : Concatenate the API Key, Request URL,Request Body and Nonce into a single string. a python example showcasing how to send a signed request ```python import json import requests from time import time import hashlib import hmac apiKey = "Your Api Key" secretKey = "Your Secret key" url = 'https://api.nonkyc.io/api/v2/cancelorder' nonce = str(int(time()*1e3)) req_body = {'id' :'5845454765457',} json_body_data = json.dumps(req_body,separators=(',',':')) data_to_sign = f"{apiKey}{url}{json_body_data}{nonce}" signature = hmac.new(secretKey.encode(), data_to_sign.encode(),hashlib.sha256).hexdigest() headers = { "X-API-KEY": apiKey, "X-API-NONCE": nonce, "X-API-SIGN": signature, "Content-Type": "application/json" } response = requests.post(url, data=json_body_data, headers=headers) ``` ### Error codes
Error Codes
Error Code HTTP Status Code Message Details
400 400 Unknown error An unknown error occurred somewhere in the system
402 400 Method not found The requested API method was not found
403 401 Action is forbidden for Account
429 429 Too many requests Action is being rate limited for Account (Private)
500 500 Internal Server Error
503 503 Service Unavailable Try it again later
504 504 Gateway Timeout Check the result of your request later
1001 401 Authorization required
1002 401 Authorization failed
1003 403 Action is forbidden for this API key Check permissions for API key
1004 401 Unsupported authorisation method Use Basic authentication
2001 400 Symbol not found
2002 400 Currency not found
10001 400 Validation error Input not valid
20001 400 Insufficient funds Insufficient funds for creating order or any Account (Private) operation
20002 400 Order not found Attempt to get active order that not existing, filled, canceled or expired.
20003 400 Limit exceeded Withdrawal limit exceeded
20004 400 Transaction not found Requested transaction not found
20005 400 Payout not found
20006 400 Payout already committed
20007 400 Payout already rolled back
20008 400 Duplicate clientOrderId
20010 400 Address generation error Unable to generate a new deposit address. Try request later.
20011 400 Withdrawal not found The referenced withdrawal was not found.
20012 400 Withdrawals disabled Withdrawals are disabled for this currency or system wide. Check system status page.
20013 400 Withdrawal amount below minimum Minimum withdrawal amount for any currency is Withdraw Fee * 2.
20014 400 Withdrawal address invalid Ensure the address you are withdrawing to is correct.
20015 400 Payment ID Required This currency requires a paymentId when making a withdrawal request.
20016 400 Invalid confirmation code The provided confirmation code is incorrect.
20017 400 Withdraw already confirmed The withdrawal request has already been confirmed.

post.description: Make a new spot market trade order

userProvidedId.description: A unique id string assigned by the user

strictValidate.description: Strict validate amount and price precision without truncation.  Setting true will return an error if your quantity/price exceeds the correct decimal places.  Default false will truncate values to allowed number of decimal places.

post.description: Cancel an open spot trade order
Cancel a batch of open orders in a spot market

address.description: Address to withdraw to.  Must be a validated address on your Account (Private).

get.description: Get a list of your Account deposits.  Ordered by created timestamp descending

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: get deposits after this timestamp (in milliseconds)

apiKey.description: An API key is a code that is generated for your account

tokenOf.description: If token, asset this is a token of

useParentAddress.description: Uses same deposit address as parent token

addressRegEx.description: RegEx for validating correct address format

payidRegEx.description: RegEx for validating correct payment id

lineChart.description: Hourly price data over the last 24 hours
Hourly price data over the last 24 hours

symbol.description: A pair such as "BTC_ETH", with delimiter between different cryptoassets

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for when the last updated time occurred.

bids.description: An array containing 2 elements. The offer price and quantity for each bid order

asks.description: An array containing 2 elements. The ask price and quantity for each ask order

ticker_id.description: Identifier of a ticker with delimiter to separate base/target, eg. BTC_ETH

base.description: Symbol/currency code of a the base cryptoasset, eg. BTC

target.description: Symbol/currency code of the target cryptoasset, eg. ETH

ticker_id.description: Identifier of a ticker with delimiter to separate base/target, eg. BTC_ETH

base_currency.description: Symbol/currency code of a the base cryptoasset, eg. BTC

target_currency.description: Symbol/currency code of the target cryptoasset, eg. ETH

last_price.description: Last transacted price of base currency based on given target currency

base_volume.description: 24 hour trading volume in base pair volume

target_volume.description: 24 hour trading volume in target pair volume

ticker_id.description: A pair such as "BTC_ETH", with delimiter between different cryptoassets

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for when the last updated time occurred.

bids.description: An array containing 2 elements. The offer price and quantity for each bid order

asks.description: An array containing 2 elements. The ask price and quantity for each ask order

trade_id.description: A unique ID associated with the trade for the currency pair transaction

price.description: Transaction price in base pair volume.

base_volume.description: Transaction amount in base pair volume.

target_volume.description: Transaction amount in target pair volume.

trade_timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for when the transaction occurred.

type.description: Used to determine the type of the transaction that was completed. buy or sell

userProvidedId.description: User provided string identifier at time of order submission

lastTradeAt.description: timestamp of last trade for this order

fee.description: fee for trade in secondary currency

alternateFeeAsset.description: if fee paid in alternate asset such as XPE
